# Portfolio Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Type
Static HTML/CSS/JS personal portfolio website

## Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (custom, no framework)
- Vanilla JavaScript (minimal)

## Structure
- `index.html` — Main portfolio page
- `styles.css` — All styles
- `script.js` — Minimal interactions
- `images/` — Placeholder folder for images

## Goals
- Images and text only (no icons library, no heavy frameworks)
- Clean, modern, responsive design
- Sections: Hero, About, Portfolio Gallery, Contact
